title: LLM-Powered Manufacturing Process Optimization: A Comprehensive Survey
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive survey on large language model applications in manufacturing process optimization.

title: AI-Driven Anomaly Detection in Smart Factory Environments
abstract: A novel approach to anomaly detection using transformer-based models for smart factory systems.

title: Method and System for AI-based Manufacturing Quality Control
abstract: A patented system for real-time quality control using AI-based visual inspection.
